---
name: 💡 Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for PaperPilot AI
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve, or what's the use case? A clear
description of *why* this feature matters is more useful than a description of
the solution alone.

> Example: "As a researcher, I want to compare two papers side by side so I can
> quickly see how their methods differ."

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered, and why you prefer the
one above.

## Which area does this touch?

- [ ] Search / discovery / ranking
- [ ] Document intelligence / RAG
- [ ] Agents (Planner / Tutor / Critic / comparison)
- [ ] Summarization / roadmaps / quizzes
- [ ] Frontend / UX
- [ ] Backend / API / ops
- [ ] Other

## Additional context

Add any mockups, references, or examples here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I checked the [ROADMAP.md](../ROADMAP.md) and this isn't already planned.
- [ ] I searched existing issues and this hasn't been requested already.
- [ ] This aligns with the project's vision (see `ProjectIdea.txt` / CLAUDE.md).
